title: Mighty Crispy Norwegian Lamb Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful Norwegian dish featuring lamb, horseradish, and garlic, perfect for a comforting meal, this paleo-friendly recipe is made in a cast-iron skillet and can be served with ssam wraps.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the skillet and set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the prepared horseradish to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until heated through.
Add the browned lamb back to the skillet and stir to combine with the garlic and horseradish.
Season the lamb mixture with salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Continue to cook the lamb mixture for an additional 5 minutes, until crispy and cooked through.
Serve the lamb mixture hot, with ssam wraps on the side.
